results.rendered_html: ādhikya (von adhika) n. Ueberschuss, Ueberfluss, Uebermaass; grosses Maass, hoher Grad; Uebergewicht, Ueberlegenheit (vgl. adhika): evametadguṇādhikyaṃ [Page1-0639] dravye dravye viniścitam  SUŚR. 1,132,17 . na dānānna ca saṃharṣānnādhikyānna ca kāmataḥ . vakṣyāmi vacanam  R. 5,90,24 . ṛddherādhikyaṃ samṛddhiḥ  P. 2,1,6 , Sch.  ŚĀK. 81 , Sch. yadāvagacchedāyātyāmādhikyaṃ dhruvamātmanaḥ  M. 7,169 . paraguṇādhikyena mānaḥ khaṇḍitaḥ  PRAB. 88,9 . mit dem abl.: yasmādādhikyamucyate  P. 2,3,9 , Sch.
